title: 3Pack Mini Submersible LED Lights Waterproof Underwater RGB with Remote Control Colour-Changing Lights, Battery-Operated Flameless Lamps for Pool Aquarium Vase Garden Party Easter Decorations
features: Customisable Colour and Brightness: Each submersible led light features RGB technology and comes with a remote that works up to 10 meters away. Select from vibrant colours, adjust brightness, or set a timer to match the mood for parties, pools, or relaxing evenings with ease.

100% Waterproof Design: Waterproof lights equipped with a rubber O-ring seal, these remote control tea lights are fully waterproof and safe for use in pools, aquariums, fountains, or outdoor vases. Rgb tea light design ensures no water leakage, providing long-lasting and reliable lighting in any environment.

Energy-Efficient Battery-Powered: Powered by replaceable CR2032 batteries, these mini light battery provide up to 16 hours of continuous illumination. The energy-efficient LEDs consume minimal power, making them a cost-effective and eco-friendly option for all your decorative lighting needs.

Versatile for Multiple Occasions: These mini LED tea lights are perfect for adding a magical touch to any space or event. Use them in aquariums, fountains, or pools, and as décor for weddings, holidays, Christmas, Halloween, or garden parties. Flameless and safe for use around kids and pets.

Simple Installation: Mini submersible led lights designed for hassle-free setup, simply twist the base open to insert the batteries and use the remote to control colour modes, brightness, and timers. Mini led tea light compact and lightweight design allows easy placement, enhancing your space in seconds.
description: Illuminate your space with the 3-Pack Mini Submersible LED Lights, a versatile and stylish solution for decorative lighting. Designed with advanced RGB technology and a waterproof construction, these small but powerful lights offer vibrant colour options and convenient remote control functionality, making them perfect for any occasion. Specifications: Name: Submersible LED Lights Light color: red/blue/green Material: Plastic Size: 30*23mm Weight: 50g Battery life: 16-24 hours How to use: 1.Twist off the cap. 2.Remove the papre sheet. 3. Twist on the mini light. 4.Adjust light with its remote. Package Includes: Submersible LED Lights x 3 CR2032 batteries x 2 Remote control x 1 Note: -The battery life of the product can be extended by reducing the brightness. -Twist the base to turn light on/off. -If the product does not light up after you receive it, you can first remove the battery of the lamp that does not light up, and install other lamps that can work normally to check whether it is a battery problem. If so, please contact us in time to resolve the problem.
